creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

We actually wait a day everytime someone asks about. Just kidding. 

Seriously, there is pccard work underway in 4.0-STABLE to make the 
xircom driver come back (I have one too!) but it just isn't in yet. 

Subscribing to freebsd-mobile@FreeBSD.org may keep you up to date, 
and asking questions@FreeBSD.org in the future would be better then 
spamming our Problem Report database.
